# ICE in Clang 21 with recursive lambda capture — infinite name mangling loop since clang-17

**Author:** mariete1223
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/139089
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** clang:frontend, confirmed, crash, lambda, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2026-02-27T19:18:13Z

## Body

Clang 21 crashes with stack overflow in CXXNameMangler::mangleExpression due to recursive lambda capturing parameter of same type since clang 17

## Assertion

No assertion

## Stack dump

In GCC bolt a SIGSEV

In local

```

## Program

```
#include <iostream>
#include <vector>
template <typename T>
struct Vlambda {
public:                                                                                    
    template <typename... Args>                                             
    explicit Vlambda(Args&&... args);                                                                                     
private:
    std::vector<T> m_args;
};
template <typename T>
template <typename... Args>
Vlambda<T>::Vlambda(Args&&... args)
    : m_args{ std::forward<Args>(args)... }
{
    [&m_args = m_args](decltype(m_args) args){};
}
```

## To quickly reproduce

Since clang-17 until current

https://gcc.godbolt.org/z/da7n4z5q1


Generated by fuzzer




## Comments

### Comment 1 - llvmbot


@llvm/issue-subscribers-clang-frontend

Author: None (mariete1223)

<details>
Clang 21 crashes with stack overflow in CXXNameMangler::mangleExpression due to recursive lambda capturing parameter of same type since clang 17

## Assertion

No assertion

## Stack dump

In GCC bolt a SIGSEV

In local

## Program

```
#include &lt;iostream&gt;
#include &lt;vector&gt;
template &lt;typename T&gt;
struct Vlambda {
public:                                                                                    
    template &lt;typename... Args&gt;                                             
    explicit Vlambda(Args&amp;&amp;... args);                                                                                     
private:
    std::vector&lt;T&gt; m_args;
};
template &lt;typename T&gt;
template &lt;typename... Args&gt;
Vlambda&lt;T&gt;::Vlambda(Args&amp;&amp;... args)
    : m_args{ std::forward&lt;Args&gt;(args)... }
{
    [&amp;m_args = m_args](decltype(m_args) args){};
}
